playbook.intent: Feature or release ships with the launch-readiness checklist green, comms drafted, metrics instrumented, and a rollback path documented.
playbook.scope: Feature or release ships with the launch-readiness checklist green, comms drafted, metrics instrumented, and a rollback path documented.

success-criteria.criterion: Comms kit reviewed and signed off

stage.name: Readiness checklist
stage.intent: Walk every function to green before the launch window.

tasks.task: Confirm engineering ship-readiness (tests, feature flag, rollback path)
Confirm support has FAQ + triage scripts
Confirm marketing has the launch comms drafted

outputs.output: Readiness checklist with green/red per function

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every function is green or has a named owner working a red item.

stage.name: Comms draft
stage.intent: Draft the launch comms across channels.

tasks.task: Draft the blog post + email + in-app message

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each comm has a reviewer sign-off.

stage.name: Instrument metrics

tasks.task: Wire instrumentation for the primary metric

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the dashboard receives test events.

stage.name: Rollback path

tasks.task: Name the on-call who will pull the trigger

stage.decision-gate: Advance when rollback was rehearsed end-to-end.

stage.name: Sign-off + ship

tasks.task: Collect sign-off from product, eng, marketing, support
Ship at the scheduled launch window

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every stakeholder signed off in writing.

stage.name: 72h watch
stage.intent: Watch the launch closely for the first 72 hours.

tasks.task: Watch the launch dashboard hourly for the first 24h
Triage incoming feedback in the launch chat room

extra.value: {human: faion get-content launch-pr-sign-off-coordination --format md, agent: faion get-content launch-pr-sign-off-coordination --format context, json: faion get-content launch-pr-sign-off-coordination --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
